titles.title: If God Is Not in It

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How do I start to thank you When all that you did is save me Even when I go astray You still hear me again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Break all my plan Cause you're I want

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If God is not in it I don't want it You carry me through the night Whispered it's alright I've got no one else to turn to But you

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Even the lilies clothed in grace, Yet I worry about tomorrow, I sometimes forget, That you are more than enough.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Remind me once again How for you've brought me through
